title: Knipe3
compiled_truth: Knipe3 is an external contact at [MSN](companies/msn). Over the corpus period (2001-10-08 to 2002-06-19), Knipe3 sent 79 and received 47 emails, totalling 126 interactions. Top correspondents: [Wollam Erik](people/wollam-erik) (75), [Constantine' 'Brian](people/constantine-brian) (70), [Joe Parks](people/joe-parks) (62), [Fenner Chet](people/fenner-chet) (56), [Corrier' 'Brad](people/corrier-brad) (27).
